injectCSS: section#main_shell,section.mod_column,section#filesystem{box-shadow:0 0 2vh rgba(92,255,238,0.16),0 0 4.5vh rgba(92,255,238,0.08),inset 0 0 1.4vh rgba(92,255,238,0.08)}div#main_shell_statusline>span,div#main_shell_actions>button,#skynetOpsCenter .skynet_card,#skynetWorkspace .workspace_card,#skynetWorkspace .workspace_panel{box-shadow:0 0 1.8vh rgba(92,255,238,0.22),inset 0 0 1vh rgba(92,255,238,0.09)}.xterm .xterm-screen canvas{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 0.7vh rgba(92,255,238,0.24))}
